Title: Authorizes the commissioner of transportation to extend a lease of certain state lands located in the hamlet of Farmingdale, town of Babylon, county of Suffolk, state of New York
Summary: Authorizes the commissioner of transportation to execute a one-time extension of an existing lease of state-owned lands located at 1 and 2 Marriott Plaza located in the hamlet of Farmingdale, town of Babylon, county of Suffolk, state of New York.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the commissioner of transportation to extend a lease of certain state lands located in the hamlet of Farmingdale, town of Babylon, county of Suffolk, state of New York
